# Summary

Describe the change, why it was made, and any rollout or migration context reviewers should know.

# Checks

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

# Notes

- [ ] No credentials, secrets, or personal data are included.
- [ ] No local-only planning docs or generated tool artifacts are included.
- [ ] Documentation was updated if behavior, configuration, or deployment expectations changed.
